attributes.title: DNS Threat — Investigate
attributes.visState:
{"title": "DNS Threat — Investigate", "type": "markdown", "aggs": [], "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": true, "markdown": "### 🌐 DNS Threat Monitoring — investigate
**Open:** [Discover (raw alerts)](/app/discover) · [Wazuh app](/app/wazuh)

Suspicious **outgoing DNS** from Sysmon Event 22 (DNS query). Normal DNS stays archive-only (level 0); these rules alert only on flagged queries.

**Detection rules (categories):**
- `100700` — query to a **known-malicious** domain (denylist) · [T1071.004](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1071/004/)
- `100701` — query to a **suspicious TLD** (.top/.xyz/.tk/…) · T1071.004
- `100702` — **dynamic-DNS / tunneling service** (duckdns, ngrok, no-ip, …) · [T1568.002](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1568/002/)
- `100703` — **long single label** (possible DNS tunneling) · [T1048.003](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1048/003/)

💡 Make hosts clickable: add a URL field-formatter to `agent.id` (see the recipe README)."}}

attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS Threat \u2014 Over time by rule", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "timestamp", "timeRange": {"from": "now-7d", "to": "now"}, "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "rule.id", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false}}
